title: Golden Enchanted Glint
description: Golden Enchantment Effect Resource Pack. 金色传说附魔特效资源包。
body:
**✨ Golden Enchantment Effect Resource Pack ✨**  

Tired of the default purple enchantment glow? Transform it into a dazzling golden shine with this sleek resource pack!  

**Features:**  
- **Luxurious Gold Effects** – Weapons, tools, and armor now emit a radiant golden particle effect, adding elegance and distinction.  
- **Wide Compatibility** – Works in most versions without additional mods—just load and play!  
- **Lightweight** – Preserves vanilla performance with no impact on gameplay smoothness.  

**Perfect For:**  
- Showcasing golden-themed gear builds!  
- Making enchanted weapons stand out in battle!  
- Adding a touch of regal flair to your adventures!  

**Installation:**  
1. Download the pack and place it in your `resourcepacks` folder.  
2. Enable it in-game via Settings > Resource Packs.  

Make every enchantment gleam like gold—download now!  

*(Note: Only modifies enchantment glint colors; no gameplay changes.)*

Comment [here](https://github.com/edeipici/Minecraft_Resource_Packs/issues/1) in Github.

---

**✨ 黄金附魔特效资源包 ✨**  

厌倦了原版紫色的附魔光效？试试这款将附魔光芒替换为华丽金色的资源包吧！  

**特点：**  
- **尊贵金色光效**：所有武器、工具和装备的附魔粒子效果现在呈现闪耀的金色，更显奢华与独特。  
- **兼容性强**：适用于大多数版本，无需额外模组，直接加载即可使用。  
- **轻量优化**：保持原版性能，不影响游戏流畅度。  

**适用场景：**  
- 打造黄金主题的装备展示！  
- 让附魔武器在战斗中更加耀眼夺目！  
- 为你的冒险增添一抹高贵气息！  

**安装方法：**  
1. 下载资源包并放入游戏资源包文件夹。  
2. 在游戏设置中加载并启用即可。  

让每一次附魔都如黄金般璀璨！下载体验吧！  

*（注：本资源包仅修改附魔光效颜色，不改变游戏机制。）*

[在此](https://github.com/edeipici/Minecraft_Resource_Packs/issues/1)评论，需访问Github。
